patch.value:
## Context
From memory notes: 'Coverage tactic: put pure logic in a small src/core/** module added to include (100% cover it); put the command file in BOTH include and exclude (like create/update) so it’s not gated.' This is tribal knowledge not in any doc.

vitest.config.ts has 100% threshold for lines/branches/functions/statements, a 150+ entry include list, and a ~50 entry exclude list. The interplay is non-obvious.

TESTING.md (full file) has no section on adding coverage for new modules.
ARCHITECTURE.md Testing Architecture section (line 277+) mentions the structure but not the include/exclude governance.

## Acceptance criteria
- ARCHITECTURE.md or TESTING.md has a 'Coverage governance' section explaining:
  - pure-logic modules: add to include only (must be 100%)
  - complex command files: add to BOTH include and exclude (coverage tracked but not gated)
  - static-gate 120-file cap for tests/unit/ enforced via scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs --max-files-per-dir 120
  - new spawn entries need static-gate orphan allowlist + coverage include-alignment list updates

## Evidence
docs/TESTING.md: no coverage governance section; docs/ARCHITECTURE.md lines 277-307; vitest.config.ts lines 16-208; scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs line 338
Add vitest.config.ts coverage include/exclude governance guidance to ARCHITECTURE.md

ARCHITECTURE.md and TESTING.md have no guidance on how to correctly wire new modules into the vitest.config.ts coverage include/exclude lists, or on the include-AND-exclude pattern for complex command files. As the project grows this omission leads contributors to accidentally skip coverage gates for new pure-logic modules or to inadvertently break 100% thresholds.

- ARCHITECTURE.md or TESTING.md has a 'Coverage governance' section explaining:
- pure-logic modules: add to include only (must be 100%)
- complex command files: add to BOTH include and exclude (coverage tracked but not gated)
- static-gate 120-file cap for tests/unit/ enforced via scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs --max-files-per-dir 120
- new spawn entries need static-gate orphan allowlist + coverage include-alignment list updates

value.note: Enhanced coverage-governance subsection: full glob set, single exclude, 100/100/100/100, SDK alias

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Enhanced the Testing Architecture coverage-governance guidance to document the current literal all-source model: the full coverage.include glob set (src, packages, scripts, plugins, docs/examples), the single src/**/*.d.ts exclude, the 100/100/100/100 aggregate thresholds (no per-file ratchet/allowlist), the bare-SDK-specifier vitest alias for example specs, and the extract-pure-helpers guidance with the local coverage command. Implemented in PR (docs accuracy & contributor-reference hardening). Verified: docs-skills-gate passed, doc unit specs (66) passed, quality:static passed, manual temp-dir smoke passed.

patch.value: ARCHITECTURE.md documents how coverage include/exclude works (literal all-source globs, single d.ts exclude, 100% aggregate, SDK alias) so contributors don't skip gates.
